title: LR LEX advises the shareholders of Sòphia High Tech in the agreement with Genenta Science (Nasdaq: GNTA)
excerptHtml: LR LEX advised the shareholders of Sòphia High Tech in the staged entry of Genenta Science (Nasdaq: GNTA, evolving into Saentra Forge) into the company's share capital, handling the legal and negotiation aspects of the deal within the Italian Golden Power perimeter, as reported by Legalcommunity.

title: LR LEX advises Audiencerate in the agreement with Microsoft and Postel
excerptHtml: LR LEX advised Audiencerate in the agreement signed with Microsoft and Postel (Poste Italiane Group) for the distribution to Italian SMEs of an integrated platform combining data intelligence, omnichannel marketing and applied AI, handling the legal and negotiation aspects of the deal, as reported by Yahoo Finance and Microsoft official channels.

title: LR LEX advises Dipres on the acquisition of a business unit from Aldo Martelli C.
excerpt: LR LEX assisted Dipres on the acquisition of a business unit from Aldo Martelli C., handling the legal and negotiation workstream of the deal, as reported by Legalcommunity.

title: LR LEX advises Audiencerate on strategic partnership with Google
excerpt: The firm assisted Audiencerate on the legal and negotiation work leading to its Google partnership and Customer Match Upload Partner qualification, following the process launched in December 2025.

title: LR LEX and Audiencerate: Microsoft partnership on cloud, data and AI
excerpt: Coverage on Il Sole 24 Ore — NT+ Diritto regarding the firm's support on the development of Audiencerate's Microsoft partnership in cloud, data and AI solutions.

title: LR LEX with Audiencerate for Microsoft partnership
excerpt: Legalcommunity coverage on the firm's assistance to Audiencerate for the development of its Microsoft partnership across cloud, data and AI solutions.

title: The firm joins ASLA — Associazione Studi Legali Associati
excerpt: LR LEX officially joins ASLA, Italy's leading association of legal partnerships, strengthening its positioning in the high-end legal services market.

title: Nominations at Legalcommunity Corporate Awards 2023
excerpt: The firm reached the finals as Law Firm of the Year in Media & TLC and Venture Capital. Partner Gianluca Leotta was also finalist as Media & TLC Lawyer of the Year.

title: Audiencerate–Nexi Group agreement for the new Customer Data Platform
excerpt: The firm's M&A and Tech team advised Audiencerate on structuring and negotiating the agreement with Nexi Group for its new CDP, one of the company's first major deals in financial services.

title: WHRO Ltd acquires Quick My Food S.r.l.
excerpt: The firm assisted WHRO Ltd in acquiring 100% of the share capital of Italian company Quick My Food S.r.l., with a team led by Partner Gianluca Leotta.

title: WaitHero acquires Mangiatutto and closes c. EUR1M seed round
excerpt: LR LEX advised WaitHero on both the M&A transaction and the related seed round with SFC Capital and institutional investors in a complex foodtech consolidation deal.

title: Legal Boutique of Excellence 2022 — Corporate M&A
excerpt: The firm was awarded Legal Boutique of Excellence of the Year 2022 in Corporate M&A, recognizing the work of Partner Gianluca Leotta and Partners Carla Talarico and Gaetano Bentivegna.

title: LR LEX joins ELITE — Borsa Italiana network
excerpt: The Milan firm founded by Gianluca Leotta joins ELITE, the private market connecting companies with multiple sources of capital, recognizing excellence and innovation in legal services.
